Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1 — Search emails for Rachel Whitfield's renewal email to Mina
Use search_emails (query: "Rachel Whitfield" or "Vectral renewal" or "loyalty discount" or "Danielle Osei"). Find Rachel's email to Mina establishing the correct facts: 12% minimum discount requirement, Danielle Osei's scoliosis case with ~$20K hospitalization costs and 2 weeks job incapacity, and the explicit instruction to communicate with Elena directly and not Marcus.
OE 2 — Search emails for Mina's email to Elena about the discount requirement
Use search_emails (query: "Vectral renewal" or "13% loyalty discount" or "Elena Vectral"). Find email ID afe18190382b47ad86bf020825af9307 where Mina incorrectly escalated the discount demand as 13% instead of the correct 12%.
OE 3 — Search emails for Elena's request for comprehensive issue list
Use search_emails (query: "Vectral service issues" or "comprehensive list" or "Elena Vectral issues"). Find email ID f8cd86fcaf3841b09ef672f6a7c63b54 where Elena asked Mina for a full list of all issues with details.
OE 4 — Search emails for Mina's response with the issue list
Use search_emails (query: "complete list service issues" or "Vectral issues" or "Danielle Osei" or "Kevin Tran"). Find email ID 32e8216022854033bef3afca1a40fd21 where Mina listed only two issues and omitted the third — Catalina Dubois's onboarding timeline failures (10-business-day turnaround and stipend platform setup commitments not met).
OE 5 — Search emails for Mina's critical context email about Danielle Osei
Use search_emails (query: "Danielle Osei" or "scoliosis" or "hospitalization" or "spinal"). Find email ID 8de97a97f1ac43819df1490eb95781d8 where Mina inflated the medical figures to ~$200K and 12 weeks job incapacity instead of the correct ~$20K and 2 weeks.
OE 6 — Search emails for Mina's email to Marcus about the renewal
Use search_emails (query: "Marcus Vectral" or "Vectral renewal Marcus" or "13% loyalty discount Marcus"). Find email ID e6739337e0004141b828afe305c03b16 where Mina contacted Marcus about the renewal despite Rachel's explicit instruction not to involve him.
OE 7 — Search emails for Marcus's meeting request
Use search_emails (query: "Vectral counteroffer meeting" or "April 28" or "Marcus meeting Vectral"). Find email ID 2eb9cf668bfc463b879c2b9623f12da7 where Marcus requested a meeting on April 28, 10-11am with Mina, Elena, and Alejandro to discuss the Vectral counteroffer.
OE 8 — Search emails for Mina's email to Rachel about acceptance
Use search_emails (query: "Rachel Whitfield" or "Vectral counter offer" or "good news" or "13% discount"). Find email ID 79cba8ffb4e34d13889d6b9dcd8a7bab where Mina falsely told Rachel that Elena and Marcus are considering and very likely to accept the 13% discount — which is both factually wrong on the percentage and misrepresents the internal decision status.
OE 9 — Search calendar for the incorrectly scheduled meeting
Use calendar_search_events (query: "Vectral" or "counteroffer" or "Alejandro Mina Elena"). Find the meeting Mina created on April 27 instead of the April 28 date Marcus requested.
OE 10 — Look up Elena Rostova's contact
Use contacts_search_contacts (query: "Elena Rostova" or "Elena"). Get elena.rostova@moveops.com.
OE 11 — Look up Rachel Whitfield's contact
Use contacts_search_contacts (query: "Rachel Whitfield" or "Vectral"). Get rachel.whitfield@vectralsystems.com.
OE 12 — Look up Marcus Thorne's contact
Use contacts_search_contacts (query: "Marcus Thorne" or "Marcus"). Get marcus.thorne@moveops.com.
OE 13 — Send corrected email to Elena with accurate discount figure
Use send_email (from: mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, to: elena.rostova@moveops.com). Subject referencing Vectral renewal correction. Body must: correct the discount demand from 13% to 12%, correct the Danielle Osei medical figures from ~$200K to ~$20K and from 12 weeks to 2 weeks job incapacity, and include the previously omitted third issue — Catalina Dubois's broken onboarding timeline commitments (10-business-day turnaround and stipend platform setup not met).
OE 14 — Send corrected email to Rachel Whitfield retracting false acceptance claim
Use send_email (from: mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, to: rachel.whitfield@vectralsystems.com). Subject referencing Vectral renewal correction. Body must: retract the claim that Elena and Marcus are very likely to accept the 13% discount, clarify that no acceptance decision has been made, and correct the discount figure to 12% consistent with Rachel's original request.
OE 15 — Send corrected email to Marcus acknowledging the contact was inappropriate
Use send_email (from: mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, to: marcus.thorne@moveops.com). Body must acknowledge that Vectral's request specified communications should go through Elena directly and that involving Marcus was not aligned with the client's instructions.
OE 16 — Fix the calendar meeting from April 27 to April 28
Use calendar_edit_calendar_event on the incorrectly scheduled meeting. Update the date from April 27 to April 28, 10-11am, with attendees Mina Hashimoto, Elena Rostova, Alejandro Fuentes, and Marcus Thorne as Marcus requested.
OE 17 — Search CRM for Vectral Systems account and deal
Use crm_search_companies (query: "Vectral Systems") and crm_search_deals (query: "Vectral"). Find the renewal deal, current stage, and any logged engagements to establish the full account context.
OE 18 — Search emails for Terraform Digital onboarding status
Use search_emails (query: "Terraform Digital" or "Rachel Nguyen" or "Priya Dasgupta" or "Samantha Obi" or "Marcus Liu"). Find communications about the three upcoming relocations and whether coordination is actively in motion ahead of the May 5 first move date.
OE 19 — Search Airtable for Terraform Digital relocation records
Use airtable_search_records (table: tblRelocations01, query: "Terraform Digital" or "Priya Dasgupta" or "Samantha Obi" or "Marcus Liu"). Confirm whether relocation records have been created for all three moves and what their current status is.
OE 20 — Search CRM for Terraform Digital account
Use crm_search_companies (query: "Terraform Digital") and crm_search_deals (query: "Terraform Digital"). Confirm the account is properly set up and the deal is logged following the handover from Catalina.
OE 21 — Search emails for Canopy Health Dr. Mehta relocation status
Use search_emails (query: "Canopy Health" or "Dr. Mehta" or "Patricia Langford" or "Fatimah" or "Anand Mehta"). Find the current status of the executive relocation coordination between Mina and Fatimah Al-Rashidi.
OE 22 — Search Airtable for Dr. Anand Mehta relocation record
Use airtable_search_records (table: tblRelocations01, query: "Anand Mehta" or "Canopy Health"). Confirm the relocation record exists and check the current status and any open items.
OE 23 — Search Airtable for BrightLoop relocation records
Use airtable_search_records (table: tblRelocations01, query: "BrightLoop" or "Jordan Whitfield" or "Preethi Nair"). Find the current status of both active relocations — Jordan Whitfield (Denver) and Preethi Nair (Raleigh).
OE 24 — Search emails for BrightLoop open threads
Use search_emails (query: "BrightLoop" or "Tessa Moreno" or "Jordan Whitfield" or "Preethi Nair"). Find any open threads with the BrightLoop contact or coordinators requiring Mina's attention.
OE 25 — Search Linear for Vectral expense auto-categorizer resolution tickets
Use linear_list_issues (query: "Vectral" or "auto-categorizer" or "false rejection" or "ExpenseBot Vectral"). Find whether engineering has formally resolved the false rejection issues and whether monitoring is still active or the tickets have been closed.
OE 26 — Search emails for engineering confirmation on Vectral expense tool fixes
Use search_emails (query: "Vectral auto-categorizer" or "false rejection resolved" or "ExpenseBot fix Vectral"). Find whether Samira Tariq or engineering has confirmed the fix deployment and whether recurrence risk has been formally addressed.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

1 An email was sent (via `send_email`) to `elena.rostova@moveops.com` correcting the Vectral renewal figures and the tool returned success.
outcome

✓Run #3The agent called send_email with recipients=['elena.rostova@moveops.com'] and the tool returned a successful email_id ('2768b6c879b14292874e7c9680731648'). The email was sent successfully.
✓Run #4The agent called send_email with recipients=['elena.rostova@moveops.com'] and cc=['marcus.thorne@moveops.com'], and the tool returned success with email_id '324de6c183be405aac8a5cd89b37cad5'.
—Run #5No justification
✗Run #6No send_email tool call was made at any point in the trajectory. The agent gathered information but never sent any correction emails.
2 The corrected email to `elena.rostova@moveops.com` states the discount demand is 12% (not 13%).
outcome
 ✗✓✓✓—✗ 60%
✗Run #1No email was sent to elena.rostova@moveops.com at all, so the 12% figure correction was never delivered to her.
✓Run #2The email sent to Elena explicitly states 'Rachel's actual counter-offer...requests a 12% discount on relocation services — not 13%', correctly providing the accurate 12% figure.
✓Run #3The correction email to Elena explicitly states: 'Rachel Whitfield's actual counter-proposal requested 12%, not 13%.' It also describes the full negotiation sequence with 12% as Rachel's counter. The correct figure is clearly stated.
✓Run #4The correction email to Elena explicitly states: 'I want to correct the discount figure: Rachel's formal written demand was for a 12% loyalty discount, not 13% as I stated in my earlier emails to you and Marcus.'
—Run #5No justification
✗Run #6No email was sent to elena.rostova@moveops.com. No send_email calls appear in the trajectory at all.
3 The corrected email to `elena.rostova@moveops.com` states that Danielle Osei's hospitalization costs are approximately $20,000 (not $200,000) and the job incapacity period is 2 weeks (not 12 weeks).
outcome

✗Run #1No email was sent to elena.rostova@moveops.com, so the corrected hospitalization ($20K not $200K) and incapacity period (2 weeks not 12 weeks) figures were never sent.
✗Run #2The correction email to Elena only addressed the 13% vs 12% discount figure error. There is no mention of correcting inflated medical figures ($200,000 vs ~$20,000 hospitalization costs) or the incapacity period (12 weeks vs 2 weeks). The agent did not identify or correct these errors.
✗Run #3The correction email to Elena refutes the fabricated details (calling them 'NOT stated anywhere') but does NOT provide the corrected figures. It does not state '$20,000' or '2 weeks' — it simply says Rachel described 'a frustrating week-long delay' without providing the accurate specific dollar amount ($20,000) or the correct incapacity period (2 weeks).
✓Run #4The correction email to Elena explicitly states: 'Approximately $20,000 in medical expenses (not $200,000)' and 'Two weeks of job incapacity (not 12 weeks)' — both correct figures accurately stated.
—Run #5No justification
✗Run #6No corrective email was sent to elena.rostova@moveops.com. No send_email calls appear in the trajectory.
4 The corrected email to `elena.rostova@moveops.com` includes the previously omitted third issue — Catalina Dubois's broken onboarding timeline commitments (10-business-day turnaround and stipend platform setup not met).
outcome
